summary: The stock has multiple bearish momentum indicators and negative return momentum, outweighing the bullish factors of being above the 20-day moving average and having a higher 20-day moving average than the 50-day moving average.
bullish_factors: Price is above the 20-day moving average.
The 20-day moving average is above the 50-day moving average.
bearish_factors: The 12-day EMA is below the 26-day EMA, suggesting weak momentum.
MACD is below its signal line, indicating weakening momentum.
The stock has negative 5-day return momentum.
The stock has negative 20-day return momentum.
